summary:
CYBERSECURITY AND INFRASTRUCTURE VULNERABILITIES: Brandon discusses alarming reports concerning the United States Federal Aviation Administration, noting that the agency relies on outdated 1995 software and floppy disks. He warns that this antiquated infrastructure will take years and billions of dollars to upgrade, leaving the nation highly susceptible to cyberattacks from foreign adversaries utilizing advanced artificial intelligence and quantum computing. Brandon also shares a vision of a major cyberattack crippling the electrical grid in New York City, plunging the metropolis into total darkness. In this scenario, generators are deployed to illuminate the streets to prevent looting, and hospitals are forced to operate on dim backup power, while lights are strategically reflected off buildings to maximize visibility.

AVIATION AND MARITIME WARNINGS: Brandon recounts recent aviation emergencies, including a commercial airliner catching fire mid-air and another plane plummeting from the sky after its dashboard went entirely blank during a flight from the central United States toward Boston. He interprets these frightening incidents as divine warnings for believers to remain vigilant in prayer. Additionally, Brandon mentions a mysterious vessel being tracked as it departs from the coast of Africa and heads toward the Americas, urging his audience to stay alert regarding its trajectory and purpose.

GEOPOLITICAL DECISIONS AND CATACLYSMIC DISASTERS: Brandon issues a dire prophetic warning regarding the geopolitical landscape, specifically concerning a proposed two-state solution involving Donald Trump, Benjamin Netanyahu, and the Abraham Accords. He claims that if Jerusalem is divided, exactly three days later, the New Madrid fault line will rupture, physically splitting the United States in half. This catastrophic earthquake would destroy bridges across the Mississippi River, devastate the region from Texarkana to Tulsa, result in thousands of casualties, and severely damage major structures, including a prominent building at the University of Oklahoma. He notes that old cast iron bells, similar to the Liberty Bell, will ring when this devastation occurs, and military helicopters will be scrambled to deliver supplies across the divided nation. Furthermore, he mentions the discovery of a massive 80-mile-wide asteroid near Neptune, adding to the impending natural threats.

DIGITAL CURRENCY AND THE MARK OF THE BEAST: Brandon expresses deep concern over the rapid transition toward a digital economy and the implementation of a tracking system akin to the mark of the beast. He critiques recent judicial decisions regarding cryptocurrency, arguing that adversarial forces are attempting to delay a prophesied wealth transfer intended for believers. He is particularly alarmed by political figures, such as RFK, advocating for wearable or implantable digital IDs and tracking devices. Brandon views these technological advancements as the foundational stages of a new, oppressive global financial system designed to exert absolute control over the population.

GLOBAL PANDEMICS AND DEMONIC DECEPTIONS: Brandon describes a terrifying vision of a new, highly contagious plague originating in the cobblestone streets of Europe, carried by rats with red eyes. The virus will spread rapidly to Africa, Asia, and Australia, leading to grounded flights, widespread mask mandates, and empty streets. He notes that the public's fear of contracting the virus through physical currency, specifically blue Euro banknotes, will accelerate the adoption of the new digital economy. Concurrently, Brandon warns of a massive demonic deception involving UFOs and glowing flying saucers appearing over places like the Vatican, Mexico, and North America. He emphasizes that these are not extraterrestrials but fallen angels orchestrating a false narrative to eventually explain away the biblical rapture.

WEATHER WARFARE AND FOOD MANIPULATION: Brandon exposes what he perceives as a deliberate manipulation of the environment and food supply by global elites. He prophesies an increase in catastrophic weather events, including superstorms, abnormal droughts, and extreme flooding caused by advanced weather warfare technologies like HAARP getting out of control. Furthermore, Brandon warns of orchestrated agricultural crises, including a fabricated disease affecting cattle that will drive up the cost of beef. In response, globalist figures will heavily push for the consumption of synthetic proteins and insect-based foods, such as grasshopper and worm burgers, as a means of population control and subjugation. He also mentions a disturbing trend of declining fertility rates among young adults, which he attributes to intentional depopulation efforts, and cautions against false celebrities who will rise to preach a deceptive, universal gospel.
rawData: [June 28, 2025]-[A great alien deception is coming and many will fall for this]-[https://youtu.be/9epckXNXLN0]-[Hey, good morning family. How are y'all doing today? Well, praise the Lord. I really appreciate you joining me. I was sent some articles about what I saw regarding the cyber attacks, and people are sending me stuff saying, 'Brandon, we started looking into what you were talking about and the United States is using Windows 95 with the FAA.' And I was like, 'Surely not.' 30-year-old software. Like, really? I mean, so Braden started researching and making sure before I talk about it, you know, because you don't want to look off. You want to make sure it's right. They are using 1995 floppy disks, and they're trying to update it, and they're saying it's going to take at least four years because of how vast this system is and all the computers, and it's going to cost billions of dollars to renew the infrastructure of the FAA computer systems. Billions is what they're saying. So all that I was talking about and what the Lord showed me in my prayer time is legit. Obviously, when you're using software from 1995, and it's 30-year-old software, and you're using computers with floppy disks, I mean, this is a major deal. We're going into a new industrial revolution with 1995 software, with AI technology using quantum computers, and we have 1995 software with AI. So obviously, when you have other countries being able to tap into the AI and hack into our infrastructure, it's probably not going to be that hard. I wonder if they're using dial-up, you know? I mean, and it's like, no, this is not cool. And they're saying it could take up to four years, so that's all of President Trump's term, clear up past it. I mean, that's a major deal. So, that was part of it. Then, right after that, we see the airlines that the Lord spoke to me about. One was on fire and had to do an emergency landing in the middle of the air. This is another sign of something that the Lord's trying to warn everybody about. Right after I give you the word, not even 24 hours later, there's a plane and it's caught fire in the middle of the air, and it has to do an emergency landing, and you can see people filming it and it's burning and doing all this stuff. And I thought, 'Lord, you're speaking so loud trying to warn your people to pray.' You know, like I said, God has not called us to fear; He has called us to pray. But He's warning us about things, telling us, 'Look, look, look, there's a problem here. There's a problem there.' And when I saw the plane falling out of the sky, you know, I don't know what caused that. I was assuming cyber attacks, but how could you get to the plane and turn it off? I have no idea. All I know is I saw a plane; its dash went completely blank and it fell, and it was very dangerous. I could tell you where it was leaving from. It was leaving from the central part of America and it was going northeast. It was going northeast to like the Boston area, and this was a major flight, and it was halfway there and it went down. I can tell you that's what it looked like. Now, is that going to be every plane? And is that just something that the Lord's trying to show us, is what I'm trying to say, or is that the exact flight? Because sometimes He's just showing me an example of something to pray about and saying, 'Hey, just letting you know the flights.' Just kind of like people are saying about the boat, and they're trying to figure out, and they have trackers on all the boats. So, you're sending me the trackers of all the red decks with all the black-bottom boats with the white thing, and they're sending stuff, saying 'we got to track this boat, and this is where it's at.' Now folks, I'm going to tell you, whenever I saw this boat, it was leaving Africa. It was leaving that area over there, and it was headed this way. So, the crew—I've told you all about that. I don't need to rehearse all that, but it was coming out of the Europe area, Africa, all that area. That's all I remember—seeing Africa in a distance, and it was coming out of that area. And number three, about what people wanted to know about the buildings and the electric outages: I saw cyber attacks coming upon our electric grid, that it was very vulnerable. And I saw it was a major city, and I saw it was New York, and it was completely dark. And that's whenever I told my son they were trying to bring in generators to keep people from looting and rioting, stealing everything because it was so dark in the city. And I could remember seeing those big spotlights running on generators, trying to keep sections of the city lit up so that the police and the law enforcement could keep law and order in that area when the electricity was off. But I remember it was very hot outside. And I told Braden, I even saw the emergency power on hospitals coming on. So they were trying to keep people alive in hospitals, but it was a dimmer light; it wasn't as bright as normal, like the hospital all lit up—it was like backup power. And so, you know, I see these things, but I thought it was interesting in this vision, whenever I was praying and the Lord was showing me that the light was shining on the buildings, trying to cause a mirror effect so that it would glow more instead of just having it shoot straight up in the air. It was trying to shine on the buildings to cause light down below, like blocking the light from just going straight up is what it would look like in the vision. So, that's part of what I saw too. So, you know, I see all these things and the Lord tells us what to pray about. I believe there's a lot of things that we can stop in prayer, as everybody knows who is a prayer warrior. Hey, and by the way, whoever sent me these hankies because I was using the Kleenex there, she embroidered my last name on it. And I thought it was really nice of the sister to do that. You know, it's too pretty to blow your nose in. I was like, 'Hey, you know, somebody writes your name on it.' I don't blow my nose in it, but it's really pretty. I appreciate it. You know, that people take the time to do stuff like that. I don't know if you had a machine do that or whatever, but I thought it was kind of cool. The other thing: praying over our water supply, praying over because, you know, I've told you about the water supply. Oh, and then somebody sent me a thing about they found an 80-mile-wide asteroid, and it's by Neptune or something, and they were freaking out about that because Fox News said it was, and they said it was—I don't know if it's coming this way or not, but I'm telling you, I get so much now from people that are into articles, and they send it to Diana and she goes, 'Brandon, I think you should see this.' And I'm like, 'Wow, I'm getting a lot of cool stuff.' So, there's an asteroid that is 80 miles wide. This thing is massive. I mean, that's a huge piece of ice or rock or whatever it is that's flying around out there. Then I see an article from Fox News saying that Trump and Bibi have agreed on a two-state solution. And that was one of the things from the Abraham Accords. And they were saying how they were wanting to make a two-state solution; they were agreeing upon it. And I've already told you all: if they do this two-state solution, three days later, the New Madrid fault line will be split in half, and America will be divided in half. If you want to watch that, that video is down below. I told you all when this happens, I saw great big Chinook helicopters flying from the west to the central part of America. They had supplies. They were trying. It sounded like the earth was shaking. They had so many helicopters trying to bring supplies from the west to the central part where the United States was divided. This is whenever I told you I saw the lion's face and I thought, "What is this lion's face?" And it was carved into a side of a building and I warned everybody. I saw tumbleweeds going down Wall Street. I saw a side of the building and I saw the lion, and the Lord spoke to me. He said, "Look at the lion on the side of the building." But I didn't know what building it was, but it is the New York Stock Exchange. That's what this building is. And the Lord warned me about it. And he told me, "If you divide Jerusalem, if they do a two-state solution and they do this, I'm going to divide America." And I saw it split down the middle. I saw all the bridges that were going from west to east that were completely destroyed on the Mississippi River. I saw it was the most devastating. And I saw from Texarkana to Tulsa, Oklahoma, I saw over 1,800 people die. And the massive building that's at OU was split down the middle. The big skyscraper look, you know, that big hospital-looking building was split down the middle when this earthquake takes place. I saw it completely. Half of the building was broken off at the top and it broke down, and all that was laying on the ground, and I remember it was on fire. And then I saw all the houses that were built on cinder blocks were completely leveled. Houses that were on a foundation were better, but the people who had houses on cinder blocks, they completely were gone. And I saw the New Madrid; there were thousands of people that passed away from this event that takes place. And that's why I've always told people, we must not divide Jerusalem ever. For when we do, three days after—I want you to hear me, that's how strong this word was. He said that the Liberty Bell—I saw the bell ringing. I saw bells, old cast iron bells ringing when this happens. Three days after it's divided and it's agreed upon. We have three days and he'll divide America. I'm talking straight down the middle. So, that's one thing you need to know. We must pray that this does not take place. It's very, very important. This is the article saying that they want to make a two-state solution. And it's on multiple Abraham Accords and all these different things, these peace agreements. They want to do all this, but it's on multiple news channels. And even the Jerusalem Post is talking about it. And I was like, this is not something that we want to be involved in. Then we saw Judge Torres's decision and I was disappointed in that. That was another thing that was decided yesterday. And so, you know, we pray for our judges, folks. I don't understand, you know, really, I don't have a legal mind like that, you know, and when Diana is reading it to me, I'm like, that's like speaking like another language to me. So, I'm trying to understand what was decided. And it said August 15th, like they have to make another decision by August 15th. And that goes to the second courts or something and that could go clear into 2026. And I told you all, I said I saw the enemy hovering above the decision-making when it comes to crypto, saying all the, you know, like putting a kink in the hose because he knew exact cryptos that would become a wealth transfer because of all the prophetic words that had been given. And he was trying to delay the wealth transfer for the body of Christ. And the Lord said, "You must stand and pray in the gap concerning this because the enemy is trying to put a kink in this and you must stand and pray." I warned you all about certain cryptos for car loans and house loans. There's a major thing decided upon that, and it was an article, and I saw that and I thought that was really interesting. And that was a word that was given clear back in February, and I was driving around and the Lord spoke to me about certain cryptos in the future that would be created for housing loans and for car loans, and I thought it was interesting. So then you see that being talked about now, and I was like, "Folks, we're in the last of last days here." They're going to a digital platform with a digital currency, with a digital everything in the days ahead, and a new industrial revolution is coming, and people don't realize how close we are to the mark of the beast system. When RFK started talking about everybody needed to put a tracking device on them in America and put some kind of digital tracking device on them either in their body or on their wrist, I thought, "Does he even realize what he's saying? Is he a born-again believer?" Obviously, I don't think—I don't know. But folks, he said it out of his mouth. And we're talking about a man that we're like, "Oh, yeah. He's a great guy. We want him in there." And I'm like, "No, he's talking about putting tracking devices on people's arms." And everybody needs to have some kind of digital ID or whatever it was. And I looked at Diana. I just, you know, whenever you're seeing things unfold so quickly in front of your face, you're just going, "Hold on a minute. Just a timeout. Just hold on. What? What did you just say? Everybody's going to have like a watch on or something for a digital ID or what for? Hold on. What? And or have it in your skin?" I thought, "Well, there it is. Well, who's creating it?" And here our best friend RFK is talking about implementing it. And they're even saying, "We have a leak." Well, I'll be. "We have a leak. Somebody leaked this to CNN. It's in the White House. We're going to find them and prosecute them." I said, "Well, I'll be. A mole. Really, I tried to tell everybody there's more than one. There's three moles. One is in the Pentagon, but there's more moles." So, but the Lord said to me, he said, "Brandon, you'll be so thankful. The American people will be so thankful you have a strong leader behind the helm in the days ahead of your country. If Kamala Harris would have been here, it would have been very bad. You have the people that are like, "Hell, fire, and brimstone. Bring it down, Lord. Burn them up." And then you have the ones going, "Grace, grace, grace." There is a protection for the believer, those that will rise up with a backbone like a crowbar and take their authority and say, "Listen, you're not going to touch us." Right? Until we are removed, and then I'm telling you, full steam ahead, it's going to get crazy up in here. But the body of Christ is the great restrainer, of the Holy Spirit inside of us. It's like you see the spiritual drought upon the land. A spiritual drought. I hear the sound of an abundance of rain. Take hold. Take hold. A rattling of the bones. A rattling. I see the final touches of things. Watch. I keep hearing it: watch for the Sooners. You're going to start to see the popcorn popping in the pan, per se. What I'm going to tell you all today is you'll see the beginning of healings, but it'll be creative miracles and they'll be sporadic. It's starting to be what you see when the first kernels in a pan are heating up and the popcorn is getting ready to go. I see those first kernels popping up across the world as we speak right now. And as we hear about them, you'll say, 'What's going on over there?' But you'll see these, and they're going to be shock and awe moments. What is this? What is this? They'll say, but there'll be shock and awe moments. Even the pastors and the people who are walking in it, that have been believing for it, when they see it start to manifest, it's going to be shock and awe to them. Let it flow like a river. Don't control it. Like you think, 'Well, I've got to bridle this, so I can't let it get out of control because if we do that, then the people get out of control.' Let it flow. God is breaking down this dam, and there's going to be a major flow of Him. I see a flow. I'm telling you what He said: 'Can these bones live?' Don't be afraid of what's about to take place, ministers. Don't be afraid of it. Embrace it. Let it go. You say, 'Well, that's chaos.' I hear Him say, 'Well, that's chaos.' Like, you know, 'We have to have order. We have to have order. That's chaos, brother. We've got to bridle this.' The Lord, I see it like a river that's just going to take you. You don't control a river. A mighty rushing river like the Mississippi, you can't control it. You go, 'Well, we're going to try to control it.' You ain't going to control that. It's going to knock you over. Does that make sense, what I'm trying to tell you? There's no controlling a rapid river, rapid water. It's rapids, like the Colorado rapids they go tubing on. This is rapid water, and if you go out there, it's going to take you over. Just get on the boat and float down the river. Enjoy the ride. Let the river go. This is the last one that will flow like this. You hear me? This is the last river that will flow like this. Lord, there's people that need encouragement today. Again, I see they're on the verge of giving up. They need a fresh cup of water, fresh drinks today. Fill their cup, Lord. They lift it up, Lord. Oh, lean into Him today. He's bringing in the new wine today. A new refreshing over their spirit, a new refreshing to get their job done, blowing like wind underneath the wings. You float. Just like they let the wind carry you, you're just going to flow like the big eagles up there. They're just soaring. They go so high and they soar, and they catch the current and it's carrying them around. We've got to catch the Holy Ghost current. There's so much change coming. I plead the blood over my ears. I plead the blood over my eyes for what I just saw. I plead the blood over that. I saw the plague again. And I see the rats again. They're not bats; these are rats. But these rats have red eyes. They're the carrier of the disease. A plague. I just saw a glimpse of that factory again with the sign of contamination on it, with that caution tape across the doors. Factories will be shut down.
